recentTweets.text:
Today, we commemorate the life of our friend, colleague, and civil rights champion John Lewis.

In his memory, we will continue to make good trouble and foster the beloved community he fought hard to bring about. https://t.co/xxdRi6x9TM

Great to meet with leaders from the Illinois Soybean Association in my DC office this week!

Farmers need relief and certainty, and I’m committed to the fight to support Illinois agriculture and the communities depending on it. https://t.co/V4PTPAT0IH

Thank you to all 15,000+ of you who joined my telephone town hall!

I always appreciate the chance to hear directly from neighbors across Central and Northwestern Illinois. Your questions, concerns, and ideas help me better represent our communities in Congress.

If you need help https://t.co/l4Iw9XF6sD
The 14th Amendment is part of our Constitution. Here’s what I shared with @WJBC about birthright citizenship. https://t.co/xLppOHQ05d

The Center for Youth & Family Solutions is critical to making sure foster kids don’t fall through the cracks.

I sat down with leaders for an important conversation about fighting back against cuts to federal funding that could spell disaster for our most vulnerable neighbors. https://t.co/YnCrhMbhS5

Senator Lindsey Graham, a veteran of the United States Air Force and the Congress, deserves our nation’s thanks for his decades of service. Whether you agreed with his views or not, he always believed in fighting for a strong and secure America. My thoughts are with his https://t.co/8Fb9CxFlvZ
Great to make a stop at the longest running county fair in all of Illinois! https://t.co/K1FRV5r3RW

Adam White and his team at RC Outfitters have kept Peoria and Central Illinois running for nearly half a century! I am proud to award them with a special Congressional certificate of recognition. https://t.co/tgTYA4Ac5d
https://t.co/BeYcBmzsWx

Williams, White & Co. has been powering Illinois manufacturing since the 1850’s!

Great to stop by and take a tour of some of their cutting-edge technology that is moving our nation’s economy forward right at home in Moline. https://t.co/yu9h0ZIG4k

HAPPENING NEXT WEEK: I’m hosting a telephone town hall to answer your questions and discuss how I’m working to lower your costs.
Sign up to join me: https://t.co/58RVSz57Ge https://t.co/oFaPlBETwW

Nothing like a local coffee spot! Definitely add CXT in Peoria to your places to try! Oh, and it’s always a good idea to eat some locally-baked macarons! 

Small businesses like this are what keep our communities strong. https://t.co/8Cg9bFFjbL
Happy 250th to the United States of America! https://t.co/EKkwVXHQLu
For 250 years, America's story has been written by hardworking people, strong communities, and neighbors looking out for one another. Happy Independence Day! https://t.co/2Olp4a72IV

Join me for my next Telephone Town Hall, Tuesday, July 14th!

I’ll be answering your questions, sharing updates on what I’m working on in Congress, and talking about the issues that matter most to families across Central and Northwestern Illinois. https://t.co/Psj848aPCf

Our office has helped return more than $2 million to neighbors across #IL17 in just the first six months of 2026!

Whether it’s helping families with federal agencies, veterans access benefits, or seniors receive the assistance they’ve earned, serving our community means https://t.co/6fuCaYClD3
It was so wonderful to have this year’s IL-17 Art Competition winner Adylene (and her Aunt) in the Capitol to see her work on display. Made my day and week! https://t.co/pMNLMG5Lfa

Illinois farmers want to succeed. They want certainty in their jobs. And they want us to have their backs when disaster strikes.

That’s what I’m fighting for on the House Agriculture Committee. https://t.co/PUZwlRVoTm

You can’t tell a farmer that climate change is a hoax. They know.

I’m fighting to make sure we have the forecasting and resources to keep people safe, save money, and protect our planet for future generations. https://t.co/Qwzp6kH16q

The House and Senate passed a bipartisan bill to keep money in your pocket. But Trump’s refusing to sign it unless he gets his way to make it harder for people to vote in November. My thoughts: https://t.co/TnJ3IDzGZ1

Every hometown deserves safe, reliable infrastructure.

Albany, Illinois’ wastewater treatment facility is more than 60 years old. Now is the time to invest in the future and health of this community.

That’s why I’m fighting to bring back more than $800,000 in our federal tax https://t.co/Zny6AbGPCY

Not only do I have the privilege of representing Rock Island Arsenal, but I co-chair the bipartisan caucus that supports depots and arsenals.

I welcomed leaders from the Pentagon to Capitol Hill to discuss how we best strengthen the Organic Industrial Base. https://t.co/sowOaWsjvz

Families are paying more for just about everything — groceries, gas, utilities, and prescription drugs.  

Proud to announce my plan to keep money in your pocket by lowering everyday costs and taking on Big Pharma to help make prescriptions more affordable. https://t.co/DcVvsMD3OI

I’m sending my deepest condolences to Col. Gregory Watson’s family, friends, and all who knew him.

From Normal Community High School to the public radio station at Illinois State University to the Air Force Reserve, Col. Watson undoubtedly left a positive impact on our state and https://t.co/HrhKuyXZeX
Happy Father’s Day to all of the fathers across IL-17, especially my dad! https://t.co/VPMUayzgjR

On Juneteenth, we celebrate freedom and honor the generations of Black Americans whose strength and resilience helped move our country forward.  

Today, we recommit ourselves to the ongoing fight for equality, justice, and opportunity for all. https://t.co/eNi9j78LJn

Stopped by Joh’s Cafe in Downtown Moline to congratulate Mark and Lindsey on their recent opening and welcome this great veteran-owned, family-operated business to the community. Wishing them continued success! https://t.co/VvkNhBJI4i

My team has been briefed on the storm damage in and around Monmouth. Please be careful as the threat of severe weather is not over and remember our community is strong because of the bond between neighbors. I’m very thankful we are hearing of no one being hurt. https://t.co/iC8ED0fRtP

Great being on the farm with Phil Fuhr, a 6th generation farmer in Taylor Ridge. We talked about how farms like his are trying to keep up with rising fertilizer costs while losing access to markets to sell their products.

In Washington, I’m leading legislation that would lower https://t.co/LFbqVBQkHC

Great meeting with East Moline’s new Fire Chief, Darrin Armstrong, at Jennie’s Boxcar to discuss the future needs of the department.

Grateful for the firefighters and first responders who work every day to keep our communities safe. https://t.co/ZdJH0vThEI

Some of America’s favorite snacks are made right here in Freeport. Great touring SNAK King and seeing how this facility helps deliver products across the country and around the world.

And special congratulations to Deb on her retirement after 34 years — thank you for your hard https://t.co/JGA1zV3aXA

🚨Two-Day severe weather event today and tomorrow. 

Keep an eye to the sky and pay attention to your trusted sources to keep you safe. https://t.co/d5uRWDZaQX

Today I voted against giving Trump a $70 billion blank check for ICE and CBP.

Here’s why: https://t.co/RdiW2ciJIu

I’ll never forget being on air in 2008 reporting on a mass shooting at my alma mater, Northern Illinois University.

In the nearly two decades since, our nation’s gun violence epidemic has continued to get worse.

It’s why I support a ban on assault weapons, red flag laws, and https://t.co/ZuYSZIcQfy

We survived 14 hours in the Armed Services Committee Room for the FY27 NDAA Mark-up. But I must say thank you to these two awesome members of our team: Cate and Julia. They are always working nonstop on everything military, veterans, and healthcare (among many other things). I am https://t.co/4QGnUaVG5j

Light Up Pride was a powerful way to kick off Pride Month in the Quad Cities. 

Pride is about visibility, community, and making sure every person knows they belong exactly as they are. Proud to stand with so many neighbors, advocates, faith leaders, and organizations celebrating https://t.co/70S9VA9PeI
My neighbors at Rock Island Arsenal should have the opportunity to join a union. https://t.co/6fdSGaEfvb

If Pete Hegseth wanted a meritocracy, he'd be promoting the leaders who have earned the trust of their troops and who will do right by our country.

Not just those who look like him. https://t.co/YRPob2oWjc

Farmers in Northwestern and Central Illinois are struggling.

Farm bankruptcies were up by over 130% last year across the country.

Trump’s Secretary of Agriculture just doesn’t care. https://t.co/mTxAbSdXDP
It’s going to be a busy day in both the House Agriculture and Armed Services Committees. Follow along! https://t.co/R35c9vLI10

🌪️⚡🌧️ FIRST ALERT: Today, I got to meet a group of weather and climate scientists who walked 250 miles to tell Congress to invest in weather prediction infrastructure! They shared the personal stories of Americans who have been impacted by climate change and extreme weather.

As https://t.co/Ie5ezeWRLH

It’s always an honor to greet our VIP neighbors as they return home from an honor flight to Washington, D.C. 

Their example of service helps guide me forward in the work I do. https://t.co/tsISgR0m1T

National Guard members and their families make incredible sacrifices to protect Illinois and our country.

I’m proud to co-lead bipartisan legislation that would ensure families get the benefits they have earned during times of crisis. https://t.co/dhZK2c2Oc4

Visited Churchview Garden Homes to learn more about this important affordable housing project on Peoria’s South Side. This is a critical investment in helping to support families and strengthen the community.

Too many people are struggling with housing costs, and I’ll keep https://t.co/UPagbym1AJ

Stepped into a true Peoria staple at @FredsShoeRepair!

Amazing to see a family-run business celebrating 53 years! Great meeting Ray, his son Jared, and the team keeping this longtime tradition going strong. https://t.co/eo9KaLWJKR

Today marks the beginning of hurricane season, and it’s a reminder that severe weather preparedness is not optional—it’s essential.
That’s why I’m leading legislation that creates a National Weather Safety Board to investigate severe weather events so we can build resilience. https://t.co/xpDqBpjRxU

I am just sickened to learn of the tragedy today in Muscatine, Iowa. I reached out to Congresswoman Miller-Meeks and offered my condolences and support. We must find ways to settle our differences without the use of guns. I share my sorrow with everyone involved. #MuscatineStrong https://t.co/zyfS2w3SVp

Pride Month is a celebration of courage, authenticity, and community. 

In 2022, I became Illinois’ first LGBTQ member of Congress. Since then, I’ve fought against hurtful and divisive legislation that would take us back to a time when we weren’t allowed to be ourselves. 

I will https://t.co/KHjCa2Pu6C

From supporting local businesses to strengthening regional transportation, Albertus Airport plays an important role in northwest Illinois. 

Proud to continue fighting for federal investments that help communities like Freeport grow and compete for the future. https://t.co/tHAE2JQ8Bz

Thank you to everyone who came out to the Peoria town hall.

I always appreciate hearing directly from my neighbors and bringing your voices back to Washington! https://t.co/hOyc5j05W4

My heart is with Harlem-Roscoe Fire as they mourn the loss of one of their own. We ask so much of every first responder and it’s my hope they feel the support and love of everyone in Illinois. https://t.co/9aWT8Hlui8

Each year, it’s an honor to mark Memorial Day with my neighbors at Rock Island Arsenal.

Together we remember those who gave their lives in defense of our nation and teach the next generation that we all have a role to play in protecting our democracy and freedoms. https://t.co/pSg83aa8PR

HAPPENING TONIGHT: Hope to see you at the in-person town hall in Peoria! 

Starts at 6 p.m. 

RSVP here: https://t.co/UJxeW0Tw7v https://t.co/vDmvWvgUma

The Quad Cities is facing a shortage of more than 6,500 housing units—and families are feeling the impact every day.

Had a strong conversation with Quad Cities housing leaders and community partners about the challenges people are facing and the work being done to support our https://t.co/bY8m9YqXXT

Great visit with Brian Corkill and the Illinois Farm Bureau today discussing conservation practices and the future of farming in Illinois. Proud to support the farmers working every day to feed our communities and protect our land. https://t.co/yZAaa4iTqd

Since my first year in office, I’ve worked with partners like Heartland Health Services in Peoria to make sure my neighbors can afford their medicine.

I won’t stop fighting to pass my bipartisan STOP GAMES Act which will increase access to cheaper, generic drugs. https://t.co/cE8Vi5lLUn

Our District Director met with Mark Scotch from the Organ Trail as he biked through #IL17, raising awareness about the need for kidney and liver donations.

Mark’s cross-country journey has inspired people nationwide and earned recognition from the Today Show and USA Today’s Best https://t.co/ckxKFXlypb

I was honored to help kick off Memorial Day weekend at Hero Street Memorial Park in Silvis. 

Hero Street stands as a powerful reminder of the sacrifice made by so many families in this community who answered the call to serve our nation. 

Let us always honor the brave men and https://t.co/H6tbv0NKN3

This Memorial Day, I commemorated and recognized the sacrifice that our nation’s brave heroes gave to our country at the Rock Island Arsenal National Cemetery. 

American soldiers are the backbone of our nation, and I was happy to honor the men and women today who serve to https://t.co/SDOhkvfK3c

This Memorial Day, we honor the brave Americans who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. 

Their courage and selflessness helped protect the freedoms we enjoy today. As we gather with family and friends, may we take time to remember and reflect on those who gave https://t.co/ybuqa5G0Yl

assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
